title: theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: No chance asteroid will slam into the moon in 2032, NASA says
items.description: NASA says there's now zero chance that asteroid 2024 YR4 will crash into the moon in 2032

items.title: Jury deliberating at sex trafficking trial of the Alexander brothers, real estate’s 'A Team'

items.title: Millions of Americans under threat of tornadoes as spring storm season kicks in early in the US
items.description: Forecasters say the first major storm outbreak ahead of spring is threatening much of the United States

items.title: Woman detained in investigation of 2 girls' bodies buried in suitcases, Cleveland police say
items.description: Cleveland police say they expect to charge a 28-year-old woman in the investigation into the remains of two girls found buried in suitcases

items.title: Capitol rioter who was pardoned by Trump gets a life sentence for molesting 2 children in Florida
